relationships: kab:Marie tella tesɛa kraḍ n yimdanen yid-s
kab:Mary tenna-d dakken tḥuss i yiman-is tesɛa zzheṛ
kab:Tfaq Mary dakken tella tesɛa tuɣdaḍt
kab:Mary tella teẓra dakken tesɛa lḥeqq

kab:Tella tesɛa akud akken ad texdem ayen tḥemmel
kab:Marie tella tesɛa adlis ddaw yiɣil-nnes
